theme_and_archetype.description: GHOST is a high-end 'Haunted Terminal'. It rejects cliché Matrix-green for a sleek, premium hacker aesthetic using deep void black, ghostly bone white, and pale phosphor cyan. It emphasizes readability, generous spacing, and crystal-clear hierarchy over cramped authentic terminal simulation.

background.description: Deepest void black with a microscopic hint of cool blue/purple.

surface.description: Used with backdrop-blur-2xl to create ghostly translucent panels.

primary.description: Pale Phosphor Cyan. Used sparingly for active states, tool execution highlights, and the primary 'Ghost' accent.

secondary.description: Ghost Bone White. Used for primary typography to avoid the harshness of pure #FFFFFF.

accent.description: Ethereal Lavender. Used for the 'thinking' state or secondary accents.

muted.description: Dark Slate for inactive elements, timestamps, and borders.

border.description: Ultra-subtle borders to separate bento grid panels.

body_font.usage: Chat transcript, UI labels, tool logs.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-[#F8F9FA] font-['Space_Mono']
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#F8F9FA] font-['Space_Mono']

spacing_and_layout.container: h-screen w-full overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-[#050508] text-[#F8F9FA] p-4 md:p-6 gap-6

grid_system.sidebar: w-full md:w-64 lg:w-80 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-6
grid_system.main_chat: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl bg-[#0B0C10]/50 backdrop-blur-xl relative
grid_system.right_panel: w-full md:w-80 lg:w-96 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous. Panels should have p-6 or p-8 internal padding. Do not cramp text.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for major panels, rounded-md for inner elements like tool tags.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.glassmorphism: All main panels must use bg-black/40 to bg-[#0B0C10]/80 with backdrop-blur-xl and a 1px border-white/5. This creates the 'Ghostly' translucency.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glow_effects: Active elements (like the voice visualizer or active tool) should have a subtle drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(139,233,253,0.3)].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.scrollbars: MUST be custom. 1px width, transparent track, hover thumb color #44475A. Hidden entirely when not hovering.

voice_visualizer.description: A central or top-anchored HUD element in the chat showing current status.

states.listening: Fast pulsing #8BE9FD rings using Framer Motion.

chat_transcript.description: The main terminal stream. Messages appear from the bottom.
chat_transcript.user_message: Right-aligned, bg-white/5, text-white, rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm p-4 max-w-[80%].
chat_transcript.ai_message: Left-aligned, transparent bg, text-white/90, pl-4 border-l-2 border-[#8BE9FD]/50 max-w-[90%].
chat_transcript.tool_call_inline: Renders like a terminal log inside the AI message stream: '> GHOST.skill_invoked({name: "search_files"})' in text-xs text-[#8BE9FD] font-mono mt-2 mb-2 bg-[#8BE9FD]/10 p-2 rounded-md.

skills_panel.description: List of available skills (open_app, search_files, web_search).
skills_panel.style: Bento list. Each item has a Phosphor Icon, Title, and a Shadcn Switch.
skills_panel.switch_customization: Override default Shadcn switch to use #8BE9FD when checked, #44475A when unchecked.

memory_panel.style: Grid of small tags or a running terminal log of 'learned facts'. text-xs text-[#F8F9FA]/60.

windows_agent_card.description: Clean card for downloading the local PC automation starter.
windows_agent_card.style: Relative container, image as absolute inset-0 object-cover opacity-20. Dark gradient overlay. Big 'Download Agent' CTA button with 'The Tracing Beam' or glowing border effect.

settings_panel.style: Use Shadcn Select and Switch components. Dark theme overrides.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons for every tool (e.g., Folder for search_files, Globe for web_search, Desktop for open_app).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly -translate-y-0.5, border changes to border-[#8BE9FD]/50.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Staggered fade-in of panels (Sidebar -> Chat -> Right Panel).
motion_and_interaction.new_message: Animate layout, slide up with opacity 0 to 1.

hero_abstract.description: Neon digital polygon glowing in dark space. Use as background for the Windows Agent download card with heavy bg-black/80 overlay.

code_terminal_bg.description: Computer screen displaying lines of code. Use as a very subtle (opacity-5) full-page background texture if plain black is too flat.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text-[#F8F9FA] against bg-[#0B0C10] meets APCA standards. Tool-call cyan text must use #8BE9FD which has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='voice-toggle-btn', data-testid='model-select-dropdown', data-testid='skill-toggle-[skill_name]'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic sans-serif fonts. Inject the Google Fonts imports for 'Space Mono' and 'JetBrains Mono' into the global CSS.
Initialize Shadcn UI and add Select, Switch, and Button components, but strip their default white/light-grey styling. Force dark mode heavily.
Build the 3-column layout (Sidebar, Main Chat, Right Panel) using Tailwind Grid/Flex. Ensure it is fully responsive (stacking on mobile).
Implement the 'voice_visualizer' as a Framer Motion component at the top of the chat area, with props for 'idle', 'listening', 'thinking', and 'speaking'.
The Windows Agent card must use the provided pexels image URL with a strong black overlay so text is readable.
NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Only use the assets provided in this JSON.
Every button, input, and toggle must have a data-testid attribute.
